race.comment: ZATANNA (1) didn't give her rivals a sniff last start at Bordertown when leading pillar-to-post. Drops back a couple levels here and gets the 3kg claimer on to help aid the big weight. Is drawn to advantage and should be prove tough to run down again. TAINO ROCKET (10) returns and is a noted fresh performer. Strips fitter for a Balaklava trial and draws well for Holder. Looms a genuine threat. LADY MEMPHIS (7) was well below her best last time on the dirt but her form prior measures up. Willing to forgive one bad run. OUR DIVINYL (9) is another that returns and while he's yet to fire a shot fresh, his peaks measure up. Readied with an 1100m trial and jumps from a good draw. Keeping safe.
